# Great Mountain General Contracting Establishment (GMGCE)

> Great Mountain General Contracting Establishment (GMGCE), operating under the brand name Mountain Rentals, is a Saudi Arabian industrial services company based in Al Jubail, Eastern Province. We provide reliable industrial solutions for the Oil & Gas, Petrochemical, Construction, and Manufacturing sectors across Saudi Arabia and the GCC region.

## Company

- **Legal Name**: Great Mountain General Contracting Establishment
- **Brand Name**: Mountain Rentals / Mountain Rentals KSA
- **Short Name**: Mountain Rentals
- **Location**: 1st Floor, Al Jabal Street near Saudi Airlines, Jubail City Center, Al Jubail 31951, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
- **Phone**: +966 541242777 / +966 549164777
- **Email**: sales@mountainksa.com / admin@mountainksa.com
- **Website**: https://www.mountainksa.com
- **Working Hours**: Saturday – Thursday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM (AST)
- **Tagline**: Enabling Industries, Empowering Businesses, Driving Progress.

## Core Services

1. **Equipment Rental** — Industrial equipment and machinery rental (heavy construction equipment, lifting gear, industrial machinery) for short-term and long-term engagements with rapid site mobilization across Saudi Arabia.
2. **Manpower Supply** — Supply of qualified, skilled, and experienced personnel including mechanical & electrical engineers, instrumentation technicians, equipment operators, welders, scaffold erectors, safety officers (HSE), and site supervisors.
3. **Trading and Material Supply** — Sourcing, procurement, and supply of construction, electrical, piping, structural, and civil materials including structural steel, piping, safety products, PPE, electrical cables, valves, and instrumentation.
4. **Portacabin & Container Services** — Design, fabrication, rental, and installation of modular site offices, accommodation units, security posts, storage containers, and shipping container offices.
5. **Heavy Lifting Services** — Specialized heavy lifting and rigging operations using mobile cranes, crawler cranes, and certified rigging systems for industrial, oil & gas, and construction projects.
6. **Transportation & Logistics** — End-to-end transportation solutions for heavy equipment, bulk materials, and oversized cargo across Saudi Arabia and the GCC region, including flatbed/lowbed trailers, route planning, permits, and warehousing.

## Equipment Fleet Categories

- Construction Equipments (Backhoe Loaders, Excavators, Graders, Dozers, Dump Trucks, Wheel Loaders, etc.)
- Lifting Equipments (Mobile Cranes, Crawler Cranes, Rough Terrain Cranes, Forklifts, Manlifts, Telehandlers, etc.)
- Logistics & Transportation (Buses, Coasters, Flatbed Trailers, Lowbeds, Water Tankers, Pickup Trucks, Vans, etc.)
- Energy Solutions (Generators, Air Compressors, Dewatering Pumps, Welding Machines, Tower Lights)
- Special Attachments (Augers, Breakers, Buckets, Chain Slings, Man Baskets, Spider Beams)

## Key Industries Served

- Oil & Gas
- Petrochemical
- Construction
- Manufacturing
- Industrial Support

## Notable Clients

SABIC, SATORP, Alfanar, Rawabi, Nesma Partners, Nesma United, Hyundai, Samsung Engineering, Sinopec, Tamimi, TCC, Landt

## Company Values

Quality, Safety, Integrity, Excellence, Reliability, Commitment

## Mission & Vision

- **Mission**: To provide reliable industrial services and solutions that empower businesses, support industrial growth, and contribute to Saudi Arabia's sustainable development.
- **Vision**: To become a trusted leader in industrial support services across Saudi Arabia and the GCC region.
